name: profile activation accepts a P0 rule whose provenance includes a tier-1 published-standard alongside pr-corpus
command:
mkdir -p profiles && printf 'rules:
  - id: r1
    severity: P0
    provenance:
      - class: published-standard
        tier: 1
        source_id: owasp-asvs
      - class: pr-corpus
        supporting_prs: [{number: 1, verbatim_quote: x, org: a, tier: 1}]
        evidence_count: 1
        organizations_count: 1
' > profiles/p.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/validate-profile.sh" --profile profiles/p.yaml 2>out.txt && grep -q 'rule=r1 valid=true' out.txt && echo ok 1>&2
